designConstraints: Two-column layout below TopBar: fixed 360px left column (summary cards) and flexible right column (expense list), with 24px gap and 32px outer padding, consistent with the 12-column grid at 24px gutter
Must use 8px spacing unit scale (4, 8, 12, 16, 24, 32, 48, 64px) from design tokens for all padding, margins, and gaps
TopBar fixed at 64px height with background-primary (deep-navy #0F172A) and bottom border using border-default (slate-border #334155)
All cards use surface-primary (navy-surface #1E293B) background with elevation level-1 shadow (0 1px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.3)) and large border-radius (16px)
BudgetSummaryCard and CategoryDonutChart stacked vertically in left column with 24px gap between them
RecentExpensesList occupies full right column height and is vertically scrollable
ExpenseRow cards use medium border-radius (10px) with 8px vertical gap between rows and a 3px left border in the category color
ExpenseDetailPopover is 320px wide, anchored to the right of the clicked row, using elevation level-2 shadow (0 4px 16px rgba(0,0,0,0.4)) and medium border-radius (10px)
BudgetStatusBadge uses pill border-radius (9999px) with semantic color tokens: teal-success (#14B8A6) for On Track, gold-amber (#F59E0B) for Heads Up, coral-error (#F87171) for Over Budget

ProgressBar is 8px tall with small border-radius (6px); fill color transitions reactively: teal-success under 80%, gold-amber at 80–100%, coral-error over 100%; fill width animates on load (600ms ease-out using motion.easings.default)
CategoryDonutChart is 160px diameter with 24px stroke width; center displays transaction count in heading-2 style (16px/600) with a label in label style (12px/500)
CategoryLegend renders max 6 rows below the donut with 8px vertical spacing; each row: 10px colored circle + category name (body 14px/400) + amount (label 12px/500) right-aligned

NavigationTabs active state uses cta-primary (gold-amber #F59E0B) text with 2px bottom underline; inactive uses text-secondary (muted-text #64748B); underline slides to active tab in 300ms normal duration
MonthSelector rendered as a pill chip in the TopBar right zone using surface-elevated (navy-raised #293548) background with left/right chevron icons (16px, text-secondary)

EmptyState centered in right column: 64px outlined receipt icon (text-secondary), heading-2 label, body description, and a full CTA button using cta-primary (gold-amber) background with text-on-cta (deep-navy) text
All interactive elements must meet minimum touch target of 44px height × 44px width per design token touch_targets
Hover states on ExpenseRow use surface-elevated (navy-raised #293548) background at hover_opacity 0.08 with 150ms fast transition
Maximum 3 levels of visual hierarchy: TopBar (level 0) → Card surfaces (level 1) → Popover/Dropdown overlays (level 2)
Content max-width of 1280px centered on wide viewports (1440px); at 768–1024px dashboard stacks to single column with 560px max-width
Donut chart segment hover expands outward 4px in 150ms; tooltip uses elevation level-2 shadow with small border-radius (6px)
CategoryFilterDropdown uses z-index dropdown (1000); ExpenseDetailPopover uses z-index dropdown (1000); SettingsDialog uses z-index modal (1200)
All amount values displayed using DM Mono (body font family) with tabular-nums for alignment; heading amounts use heading-1 style (24px/700)
Micro-interactions at 150ms fast duration; layout transitions at 300ms normal duration; chart renders at 600ms slow duration with staggered entry per design token motion values
Reduced motion: respect prefers-reduced-motion by replacing all animations with instant renders and disabling bounce/cascade effects
referencePatterns: Card-based data display pattern: white surface cards (navy-surface) with elevation level-1 shadow, 16px radius, 24px internal padding — used for BudgetSummaryCard, CategoryDonutChart, and RecentExpensesList container

Reactive status badge pattern: pill-shaped badge with semantic background tint and matching text color (teal-success, gold-amber, coral-error) — used for BudgetStatusBadge with three states: On Track, Heads Up, Over Budget
Horizontal progress bar pattern: 8px tall track (surface-elevated) with animated fill using semantic color tokens — used for ProgressBar inside BudgetSummaryCard
Donut chart with center stat pattern: SVG ring chart with category-colored segments, centered transaction count, and vertical legend below — used for CategoryDonutChart and CategoryLegend
Filter bar with active state indicator: pill chip dropdown (CategoryFilterDropdown) with chevron icon, single-select category filter, instant list fade transition (150ms) on selection
Expense row card pattern: icon circle + two-line text center zone + right-aligned amount and payment method, with 3px left category-color border accent and hover state — used for ExpenseRow

Anchored detail popover pattern: 320px card anchored right of trigger row, elevation level-2 shadow, label-value detail rows, note display, and dual action buttons (Edit/Delete) — used for ExpenseDetailPopover
Inline delete confirmation pattern: button text changes to 'Confirm delete?' with 3-second auto-revert, no color-only indicator — used in ExpenseDetailPopover Delete action
Empty state pattern: centered icon + heading + body description + primary CTA button — used for EmptyState in right column when no expenses exist for selected month

Top bar navigation pattern: logo left, tab navigation center with sliding active underline, month selector pill + settings icon right — shared across Dashboard, Add Expense, and Spending Insights pages
Month navigation pattern: left/right chevron controls on MonthSelector pill trigger reactive data refresh with counter animation (400ms) on all displayed amounts and chart re-render (600ms staggered)

Settings modal pattern: centered dialog (max-width 420px) with dark scrim overlay (rgba(0,0,0,0.65)), currency selector, budget input, category manager, and Escape/scrim dismiss — used for SettingsDialog
accessibilityRequirements: WCAG 2.1 AA color contrast ratio of 4.5:1 minimum for all text; silver-text (#CBD5E1) on deep-navy (#0F172A) achieves ~11:1; gold-amber (#F59E0B) on deep-navy achieves ~8.5:1 — verify all text/background combinations
BudgetStatusBadge must convey status via both color and text label (On Track / Heads Up / Over Budget) — color alone is never the sole indicator per WCAG 1.4.1
CategoryDonutChart must include role='img' with aria-label describing the data summary (e.g., 'Donut chart showing category breakdown for March 2026 with 30 transactions')
CategoryLegend must supplement the donut chart with text-based category names and amounts so chart data is accessible without color perception
ProgressBar must include aria-valuenow, aria-valuemin, aria-valuemax, and aria-label (e.g., 'Budget progress: $1,247.50 of $2,000.00 spent') per WCAG 4.1.2
ExpenseDetailPopover must trap focus within the popover when open; Escape key dismisses; focus returns to the triggering ExpenseRow on close per WCAG 2.1.2
CategoryFilterDropdown must be keyboard navigable with arrow keys for option selection, Enter to confirm, Escape to close, and aria-expanded state on the trigger
All interactive elements (ExpenseRow, buttons, chips, chevrons) must have minimum 44×44px touch targets per design token touch_targets specification
Focus rings must be visible on all interactive elements: 2px gold-amber (#F59E0B) outline with 2px offset per design token state.focus_ring — meets WCAG 2.4.7
ExpenseRow click targets must have descriptive aria-label (e.g., 'Starbucks Coffee, Food and Dining, March 28, $4.50 — click to view details') per WCAG 2.4.6
Delete confirmation in ExpenseDetailPopover uses text change ('Confirm delete?') not color alone, with 3-second auto-revert to prevent accidental deletion per WCAG 3.3.4
MonthSelector chevron buttons must have aria-label ('Previous month' / 'Next month') and be keyboard activatable via Enter and Space per WCAG 2.1.1
SettingsDialog must use role='dialog', aria-modal='true', aria-labelledby pointing to dialog title, focus trap on open, and Escape key dismiss per WCAG 2.1.2
Screen reader compatible chart alternatives: CategoryDonutChart and ProgressBar must have accessible text summaries available via aria-label or visually hidden description elements

Reduced motion support: all animations (chart renders, counter animations, slide transitions, bounce effects) must be disabled or replaced with instant state changes when prefers-reduced-motion is set per WCAG 2.3.3
EmptyState CTA button ('Add Expense') must have descriptive accessible name and meet minimum contrast requirements for the cta-primary (gold-amber) background with text-on-cta (deep-navy) text
Full keyboard navigation: Tab order must follow visual reading order (TopBar → left column cards → right column list); all interactive elements reachable via Tab, activated via Enter/Space
dataModelDependencies: Expense entity: id, amount, merchant, category_id, date, payment_method_id, note, currency — used by RecentExpensesList, ExpenseRow, ExpenseDetailPopover, and CategoryFilterDropdown

Category entity: id, name, color_token, color_hex, icon, is_default, sort_order — used by CategoryDonutChart, CategoryLegend, ExpenseRow left-border color, CategoryFilterDropdown options, and BudgetStatusBadge category breakdown

Budget entity: id, month, year, amount, currency — used by BudgetSummaryCard (total budget amount, remaining calculation), ProgressBar (fill percentage), and BudgetStatusBadge (threshold logic: <80% On Track, 80–100% Heads Up, >100% Over Budget)
PaymentMethod entity: id, name, type, icon, last_four, is_default — used by ExpenseRow (payment method caption display, e.g., 'Visa •••4821') and ExpenseDetailPopover (Payment detail row)

CategoryAggregate entity (from /api/aggregates/categories): category_id, total_amount, transaction_count, percentage — used by CategoryDonutChart segment sizing, CategoryLegend amounts, and donut center transaction count

Derived budget health state: computed from Budget.amount and sum of Expense.amount for selected month/year — drives BudgetStatusBadge state, ProgressBar fill color and width, and remaining/over-by indicator text in BudgetSummaryCard
MonthSelector state: month and year integers — used as query parameters for GET /api/expenses, GET /api/budgets, and GET /api/aggregates/categories to scope all dashboard data to the selected period
